25.reason: The second polynomial input loop does not read the newline character, so it will never terminate correctly. The reference program uses a do-while loop with %c to detect newline.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  The input format specifies that each polynomial ends with a newline. Using !=EOF may cause the program to hang or read incorrectly if the input stream does not close immediately. It should read until a newline character is encountered.
